creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rene
Date: Fri Dec  6 08:11:51 2013
New Revision: 335724
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/335724

Log:
  Set expiration date to 2013-12-19, depends on expired devel/mono-tools
  
  PR:		ports/184081
  Submitted by:	myself
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (mono@, 16 days)

Modified:
  head/x11-toolkits/gtksourceview-sharp/Makefile

Modified: head/x11-toolkits/gtksourceview-sharp/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-toolkits/gtksourceview-sharp/Makefile	Fri Dec  6 06:09:25 2013	(r335723)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/gtksourceview-sharp/Makefile	Fri Dec  6 08:11:51 2013	(r335724)
@@ -11,6 +11,9 @@ DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-2.0-${PORTVERSION}
 MAINTAINER=	mono@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	gtksourview bindings for Mono.
 
+DEPRECATED=	Depends on expired devel/mono-tools
+EXPIRATION_DATE=2013-12-19
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	mono:${PORTSDIR}/lang/mono \
 		monodoc:${PORTSDIR}/devel/mono-tools
 RUN_DEPENDS=	mono:${PORTSDIR}/lang/mono \
